svg.text: Adapted from NVIDIA VSS + AIDP Blueprint
S3-compatible · Flat namespace · Unlimited object metadata · Wire-speed retrieval · No separate vector DB
S3 headers = graph edge index · JSON sidecar = semantic node · FAISS reads from INFINIA at query time (no sync, no service)
All data and intelligence co-located · No object leaves INFINIA for inference
INFINIA flat namespace: all objects queryable immediately after write. No re-indexing required.
S3 API: any FAISS-capable compute can read derived/embeddings/ directly at wire speed.
100 TB of new video added → immediately searchable. No ops. No pipeline re-run.
